<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get api by version  openapi"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/{version}/_openapi"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>
